title: Stick Scaffolding
description: Allows you to craft scaffolding with sticks
body:
Instead of traversing biomes for hours just to find bamboo in a jungle, you can now craft scaffolding with sticks! You can still craft it with bamboo.

The recipe is the same as the one with bamboo; 6 sticks, 1 string, gives: 6 scaffolding

Requires Fabric API

doesnt work with java 17 for some reason, you need java 21


(I guess this mod is the same as the one made by bushman59, but I wanted one for an older version)
Made with MCreator, so thanks to them for making it easy
(this is my first mod)
